overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character jogging along a foggy suburban road at night, passing occasional vehicles and eventually veering off onto a grassy riverside path beneath a metal truss bridge. The environment features atmospheric haze, streetlight illumination, and transitions from paved road to natural terrain.

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the right edge of a paved road beside a concrete barrier

entered.detail: low concrete wall separating road from grassy verge
asphalt road surface with lane markings
tall pole with overhead streetlight illuminating the road
large metal truss bridge structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character jogs along a foggy suburban road at night, illuminated by streetlights. A concrete barrier runs along the left side while trees line both sides of the road. A metal truss bridge is visible in the far distance.

events.description: white sedan passes by in the opposite direction
red and white van drives past on the road

agents.ego_description: continuing to jog along the road as vehicles pass by periodically

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The character continues jogging along the road as the metal truss bridge grows larger in view. Several vehicles pass by on the road, and the streetlights continue to illuminate the foggy night scene.

events.description: character leaves the paved road and steps onto the grassy verge
character passes underneath the metal truss bridge structure

agents.ego_description: veering left off the paved road onto the grass shoulder, heading toward the riverbank

entered.detail: grassy slope leading down from the road toward the river
dark water visible to the right of the path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the road and crosses onto grassy terrain, approaching the metal truss bridge. The river becomes visible to the right as the character passes underneath the bridge structure, transitioning from the paved environment to natural ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path along riverbank under bridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow dirt path beside the river, moving away from the bridge

entered.detail: narrow unpaved trail running alongside the riverbank

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the bridge, the character now walks along a narrow dirt path beside the river. The artificial street lighting is left behind, and the scene becomes darker as the character follows the riverside trail through dense vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a streetlight-lit suburban road into the dark, natural seclusion of a riverside trail. It begins with a character jogging along a foggy road flanked by trees and a concrete barrier, with a distant metal truss bridge emerging through the haze. As the character continues forward, the bridge grows larger in the frame while several vehicles pass by under the glow of the streetlights. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the pavement for grassy terrain, passing directly beneath the massive bridge structure and revealing a river to the right. Finally, the artificial lighting fades away as the camera follows the character onto a narrow dirt path, winding through dense vegetation along the riverbank in the deepening darkness.
